title: [Office of Alchemist-Mages]
description: Brass-framed pieces of slate cover the velvet-draped walls of the office, their rectangular surfaces linked by threadlike webs of silk scattered with tiny clockwork spiders.  Glass-filled racks of cork-stoppered bottles and jars are placed along the periphery of the office, the components framed by tall bookcases crafted from petrified roots.  A tri-legged iron cauldron sits amongst a bevy of scrolls and leathery grimoires, the ingredients scattered across the marbled surface of an ebonwood table.
